description: You are a digital content manager for a boutique fitness app. Process the 6 workout video segments in /home/ga/Videos/fitness_raw/ according to the encoding specification at /home/ga/Documents/encoding_spec.txt. Normalize any non-conforming files to the baseline requirements and save them to /home/ga/Videos/normalized/ with .mp4 extensions. Stitch all 6 segments (using normalized versions for non-conforming files and raw for conforming ones) into a single continuous video at /home/ga/Videos/deliverables/master_class.mp4. Extract a 192kbps audio-only MP3 version of the master class to /home/ga/Videos/deliverables/outdoor_audio.mp3. Create a standard M3U playlist at /home/ga/Videos/deliverables/studio_playlist.m3u listing the 6 individual segment files in order and a metadata JSON manifest at /home/ga/Documents/class_metadata.json containing the keys 'total_duration_sec' and 'sequence' (the list of filenames).
